title: Gentianella vvedenskyi
taxonomy: Gentianella vvedenskyi is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). This plant is classified within the genus Gentianella. It is a part of the tribe Gentianeae and subfamily Gentianoideae. The species Gentianella vvedenskyi is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. Within the plant kingdom, Gentianella vvedenskyi belongs to the domain Eukaryota and kingdom Plantae.

intro: Gentianella vvedenskyi, also known as Vvedensky's gentianella, is a plant species in the Gentianella genus, characterized by its small, yellowish flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Gentianella vvedenskyi include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
